action.reasoning: The root task requires a comparative report on the top 3 vector databases. This is a multi-step process: first identifying the top 3 candidates, then researching their features, pricing, and performance, and finally synthesizing the report. I will decompose this into parallel subtasks for research and a final integration task. I will take the integration role myself to ensure the final report meets the root goal.

subtasks.goal: Identify the top 3 vector database products and research their key features.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask identifies the leading vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Milvus, Weaviate, Qdrant, etc.) based on current market standing and researches their core features, indexing algorithms, and scalability. It produces a structured summary of features for the top 3 selected.

outputs.description: List of the top 3 vector databases selected for comparison with justification.
Detailed comparison of features for the top 3 vector databases.

subtasks.goal: Research pricing models for the top 3 vector database products.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask researches the pricing structures (free tiers, pay-as-you-go, enterprise) for the top 3 vector databases identified in root.1. It must wait for root.1 to complete to know which databases to research.

outputs.description: Detailed comparison of pricing models for the top 3 vector databases.

subtasks.goal: Research performance benchmarks for the top 3 vector database products.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask researches performance metrics (query latency, throughput, scalability benchmarks) for the top 3 vector databases identified in root.1. It must wait for root.1 to complete to know which databases to research.

outputs.description: Detailed comparison of performance benchmarks for the top 3 vector databases.

self_role.goal: Synthesize the research into a final comparative report with a recommendation.

outputs.description: The final comparative report on the top 3 vector databases, including features, pricing, performance, and a recommendation.
